mapper.update: UPDATE NMCP_BOARD_BAS SET BOARD_HIT_CNT = NVL(BOARD_HIT_CNT,0) + 1 WHERE BOARD_SEQ = #{boardSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_SEQ, BOARD_CTG_SEQ, SBST_CTG, SBST_SUB_CTG_CD, BOARD_SUBJECT, IMG_NM, BOARD_WRITER_NM, NOTI_YN, TO_CHAR(BOARD_WRITE_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS BOARD_WRITE_DT, BOARD_ATT_YN, BOARD_HIT_CNT, BOARD_CONTENTS FROM NMCP_BOARD_BAS WHERE AND BOARD_SEQ = #{boardSeq}
